subject: Zephyrous ACK: iterating ADR-185 to v2
body: ACK. I have Pearly's four GO-with-condition points and will iterate ADR-185 in the existing Zephyrous claim scope only. Target changes: make auto_acceptance advisory until marshal/tool recomputation; close the [AUTO-ACCEPT] renderer ambiguity; add the explicit edge-case exclusions; and name verifier-side recomputation as implementation scope. I will rerun markdown/prettier/vocabulary checks and report v2 back to you.
